nasb.text: Then he shall go out to the altar that is before the Lord and make atonement for it, and shall take some of the blood of the bull and of the blood of the goat and put it on the horns of the altar on all sides.

esv.text: Then he shall go out to the altar that is before the Lord and make atonement for it, and shall take some of the blood of the bull and some of the blood of the goat, and put it on the horns of the altar all around.

cnv.text: 他出來，就到耶和華面前的祭壇那裡，為壇贖罪。他要取一點公牛的血和山羊的血，抹祭壇的四角。

ccb.text: 之后，他要来到耶和华面前的祭坛那里，为祭坛赎罪。他要取一些牛血和羊血，抹在祭坛的四角上，
